operations.command: git commit -m "refactor: polish about, tech stack, glow-card styling plus CLAUDE.md and DESIGN.md"
operations.intent: Final cleanup commit for misc polish and docs

improvements_noted: User requested 'commit all but separate the work with its commit' — resolved by grouping changes into 6 scoped commits. Good pattern for future multi-feature sessions.
Working tree had a large pile of pre-existing uncommitted work mixed with new work; peeking at individual diffs before grouping prevented accidentally bundling unrelated concerns.
Loose PNG screenshots at repo root (approach.png, hero-desktop.png, etc.) were left untracked intentionally — scratch artifacts from Playwright verification, not worth committing.
